title: Message Templates
subtitle: Manage pre-defined messages for quick communication.

whatsappApproval.infoBody: Some templates must be approved by WhatsApp before they can be used for automated messages such as appointment reminders, no-show follow-ups, or post-treatment messages.
whatsappApproval.infoHint: Prepare your template, send it for WhatsApp approval, and track its status here. Approved templates can be used in automated messages.
whatsappApproval.channelHint: Templates used in WhatsApp automated messages must be approved by Meta/WhatsApp.
whatsappApproval.rejectedMessage: WhatsApp did not approve this template. Please edit the message and send it again.
